vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Wearing a vintage watch has become part and parcel of my daily attire; I feel somewhat incomplete without it.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi chặt chẽ (giờ giấc/tiến độ)
vocab.example: I prefer wearing a watch because it allows me to keep tabs on the time during meetings without looking disrespectful by checking my phone.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (diễn tả thời gian trôi nhanh)
vocab.example: Time seems to fly by in the blink of an eye when I'm busy, so having a watch helps me stay grounded and managed.

vocab.meaning: trở nên khan hiếm/đắt giá (thời gian là vàng bạc)
vocab.example: When my time is at a premium, a quick glance at my wrist is far more efficient than fumbling for a mobile device.
I used to think watches were redundant, but I had a change of heart after realizing how much they enhance one's professional appearance.
